use_cases: FAQ sections for product documentation or help centers
Settings panels with grouped expandable options
Collapsible content sections for long-form pages
Navigation menus with nested expandable items
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based accordion component with clean dotted borders and smooth chevron rotation animation. Features hover underline effects and expandable content panels. Designed as a reusable composite component suitable for FAQ sections, settings panels, and collapsible navigation menus across SaaS and documentation platforms.
